categories.title: General Questions
categories.description: Basic information about flight tickets and travel

items.a: An air ticket is a contract of carriage between an airline and a passenger, granting the right to passenger aviation transportation services, in the form of a personal document of an established sample. The ticket is a means of control and is subject to mandatory registration before departure; after registration, the passenger receives a boarding pass. The ticket is issued on the Avia Travel Club website.

A transfer is a point or points of change on the way to the final destination, the duration of which should not exceed 24 hours. For example, you are flying to London with a change in Budapest. You arrive in Budapest at 16:50 and fly further to London at 18:10. Budapest in this case is a transfer point.

A stopover is a stop at an intermediate point on your route, the duration of which is more than 24 hours. For example, you fly to Paris through Prague. If you plan to spend 2 days in Prague and then fly to Paris, Prague, in this case, will be a stopover point.

categories.title: Service Classes
categories.description: Differences between Economy, Business, and First Class

items.q: What is the difference between first, business, and economy service classes?
items.a: There are three service classes: first class, business, and economy. They differ in comfort and service during the flight. In economy class, the airline provides seats at the lowest prices. In the business class cabin, seats of improved layout are provided, as well as a large selection of food and services on board. First class differs even more in comfort and is used mainly on long-haul flights. Seats in first class recline almost 180 degrees. In this class, you can order any menu, movie, music, etc.

items.q: What is the difference between booking classes?
items.a: Booking classes depend on service classes and the cost of the ticket. Booking classes are determined by the carrier and hide a specific ticket price.

categories.title: Savings and Benefits
categories.description: How to buy tickets at the lowest prices

items.q: How to buy a flight ticket cheaper?
items.a: If your trip is not tied to a specific date, you have the opportunity to buy a ticket at the lowest price. For this, you just need to follow offers, promotions, and seasonal discounts on flight tickets (you can find all this on our website Avia Travel Club). Buy a ticket round trip immediately. Use one carrier airline for both ways. Choose flights with transfers. Follow the Sunday rule. Fix the departure dates. Buy in advance (3 to 21 days).

items.q: Is it possible to send a child on a journey alone?
items.a: A child traveling alone is a young passenger. Each airline has its own rules for transporting unaccompanied children. If the transportation of unaccompanied children is permitted on the booked segment, the agent must enter information into the booking that the child is flying alone. A notarized consent from both parents for transportation is also required. Then at the airport, an act is drawn up in 3 copies, describing who is seeing the child off and who is meeting them. The 1st copy is given to the person seeing off, the 2nd to the airline employee, and the 3rd to the person meeting upon arrival.

categories.title: Returns and Exchange
categories.description: Instructions for changing or canceling a booking

items.q: How to make a ticket refund and what is necessary for this?
items.a: You can process a ticket refund both before departure and after (you need to clarify the rules and conditions of refund when issuing the ticket; tickets may not be refundable depending on the booking class). Ticket refunds are made in the personal account on the Avia Travel Club website.

items.q: What to do with the ticket if the flight was canceled?
items.a: If you learned about the flight cancellation directly at the airport, the carrier's representative can offer you an alternative. If this does not suit you, you should make a mark in the ticket about the flight cancellation and return it through the personal account on the Avia Travel Club website, attaching a scan copy of the ticket with the representative's mark. If you learned about the flight cancellation at least 1 day before departure, you need to contact our agency employee to agree on possible alternatives. In case of disagreement, you can receive the full amount for the purchased ticket without losses.

items.q: Within what time can a ticket be refunded?
items.a: A refund of a ticket due to the passenger's fault can be made within the validity period of the ticket, which you can find out when purchasing it. Clarify the rules for refund/exchange when buying a ticket, as tickets may be non-refundable and not subject to exchange.

items.q: How to register on the site?
items.a: The system automatically registers you after the first booking. The password is sent to your specified email. A login and password are not required for viewing ticket costs if you are not yet registered.
